title: claoxylon luteobrunneum
intro: Claoxylon luteobrunneum, also known as the golden-brown Claoxylon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Claoxylon luteobrunneum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
